title: As a user, I want to log in with email and password so that I can access my account
description: Implement secure user authentication with email and password credentials including validation and error handling.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter email and password on the login page
System validates credentials against the database
Valid credentials redirect user to the dashboard
Invalid credentials show a clear error message
Account is locked after 5 failed attempts

title: Build the entire analytics module with dashboards, reports, real-time data export, ML predictions, and alert system
description: Complete analytics system covering all data visualization, reporting, and machine learning features.

title: As a manager, I want to view team performance reports so that I can track productivity
description: A dashboard view showing team velocity, completed stories, and sprint burndown charts filtered by date range.
acceptance_criteria: Manager can filter reports by sprint or date range
Reports show team velocity and completion rates
Burndown chart is visible per sprint
Data can be exported as CSV

title: As a user, I want to update my profile information so that my account stays current
description: Allow users to edit their name, email address, and profile avatar from the settings page.
acceptance_criteria: User can edit name, email, and avatar
Changes are saved with a confirmation message
Email change triggers a verification email

title: As an admin, I want to assign roles to users so that access is properly controlled
description: Role management interface for admins to assign and revoke user roles.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view all users and their current roles
Admin can assign or revoke roles
Role changes take effect immediately without re-login

title: Migrate the entire legacy database, refactor all REST APIs, update frontend to new design system, write complete documentation, and deploy to cloud
